column1: # DNBelab C4 多样品批量分析配置模板
# Multi-sample batch analysis configuration template
# 使用说明 / Usage:
# 1. 复制此文件并重命名为您的项目名称
#    Copy this file and rename it to your project name
# 2. 按照格式填写每个样品的信息
#    Fill in the information for each sample following the format
# 3. 使用 batch_run.sh 脚本进行批量分析
#    Use batch_run.sh script for batch analysis
# 列说明 / Column descriptions:
# - sample_id: 样品唯一标识符 (Sample unique identifier)
# - fastq_dir: FASTQ文件所在目录的绝对路径 (Absolute path to FASTQ directory)
# - output_dir: 输出目录的绝对路径 (Absolute path to output directory)
# - species: 物种 (human/mouse/mixed)
# - chemistry: 化学试剂版本 (scRNAv1/scRNAv2/scRNAv3)
# - expected_cells: 预期细胞数 (Expected number of cells, optional)
# - extra_params: 额外参数 (Additional parameters, optional)
# 注意事项 / Notes:
# - 使用 TAB 分隔各列 (Use TAB to separate columns)
# - 不要修改表头行 (Do not modify the header line)
# - 空行和以#开头的行将被忽略 (Empty lines and lines starting with # will be ignored)
# - fastq_dir 应包含 *_1.fq.gz 和 *_2.fq.gz 文件 (fastq_dir should contain *_1.fq.gz and *_2.fq.gz files)
sample_id
# ===== 示例数据 / Example data =====
# Sample_A
# Sample_B
# Sample_C
# Mixed_AB
